name: knowledge-atlas
description: Single-app knowledge atlas for dynamic taxonomy, core concepts, and categorized bibliography across sciences and philosophy

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check api/shared.js && node --check api/health.mjs && node --check api/taxonomy.mjs && node --check api/bibliography.mjs && node --check api/concepts.mjs && node --check api/explain.mjs
